creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: 9.0-RELEASE/amd64 - https://redports.org/~aoeui/20120603224720-48833-27432/libva-1.1.0.log
8.3-RELEASE/i386 - https://redports.org/~aoeui/20120603224720-48833-27431/libva-1.1.0.log
7.4-RELEASE/i386 - https://redports.org/~aoeui/20120604062736-21563-27475/libva-1.1.0.log

dependent ports (except for vdpau-video) were tested cheaply
by the following Makefile.inc

  WITH_VAAPI=1
  pre-everything::
          @${ECHO_MSG} WITH_VAAPI=${WITH_VAAPI}

https://redports.org/~aoeui/20120603230655-03247-27433/vdpau-video-0.7.3.log
https://redports.org/~aoeui/20120604064716-18964-27478/ffmpeg-0.7.12_2,1.log
https://redports.org/~aoeui/20120604064802-16411-27480/xbmc-11.0_2.log
https://redports.org/~aoeui/20120604070409-31438-27482/libxine-1.2.1_1.log

gnash failed somewhere else, not related to vaapi - https://redports.org/buildarchive/20120604070022-96929/
